name: io.github.AshfordeOU/kshana-mcp
title: Kshana PNT-resilience simulator
description: Run the validated Kshana positioning/navigation/timing (PNT) resilience simulator from an AI agent: SGP4/SDP4 orbits, IAU reference frames, Allan deviations, GNSS availability/DOP, ARAIM protection levels, GNSS/INS fusion, and quantum-sensor models.
